thesis: recency RED = -8% premium stop whipsawing LONG single-leg in chop; debit vertical caps risk + cuts theta/vega/whipsaw; short leg caps upside -> lower EV but better risk-adjusted + less recency bleed
fills_authority: real OPRA bars: long via lib.simulator_real.simulate_trade_real; spread via lib.simulator_debit.simulate_debit_trade (validated 15/15); SAME option_pricing_real OPRA loader -> byte-consistent fills (C1)

DISCLOSURE.structure_isolation: long baseline runs LIVE v15 layered exits = the true production comparator; spread runs net-debit pt/stop. Exit engines differ by necessity (a vertical has no ribbon-flip TP); deltas reflect STRUCTURE+exit jointly.
DISCLOSURE.short_leg_caps_upside: expected lower per-trade EV; the bar is risk-adjusted (L175)
DISCLOSURE.band: all spread legs forced inside +/-$5 OPRA cache band; band_miss disclosed
DISCLOSURE.fills: real OPRA, causal next-bar-open entry, no look-ahead
